title: Hindustan Unilever is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Hindustan Unilever is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
